notableEvents.label: Ryan O'Hearn GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan O'Hearn grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Bryan Reynolds out at 2nd. Ryan O'Hearn out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jake Mangum GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jake Mangum grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Spencer Horwitz to 3rd. Konnor Griffin out at 2nd. Jake Mangum out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jake Mangum rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jake Mangum grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Spencer Horwitz to 3rd. Konnor Griffin out at 2nd. Jake Mangum out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Horwitz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Horwitz grounds into a double play, first baseman Alec Burleson to shortstop Masyn Winn to pitcher Gordon Graceffo. Nick Gonzales out at 2nd. Spencer Horwitz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Church singles on a ground ball to right fielder Ryan O'Hearn. Masyn Winn to 3rd. Nathan Church to 2nd. Nathan Church advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by right fielder Ryan O'Hearn.
